headline: Air Products Awarded Long-Term Taiwan Semiconductor Supply Deal
summary: APD secures a long-term Taiwan deal to supply gases and infrastructure for new chip fabs and packaging sites tied to AI demand.

headline: CF Industries Holdings (NYSE:CF): A Quality Value Stock with Elite Profitability and Undervaluation
summary: CF Industries offers a compelling value play with elite profitability (10/10) and strong financial health, trading at a P/E of 11.53—far below industry peers—while delivering 43.86% EPS growth, providing a rare margin of safety for investors.
